first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the justifications, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in wording are consistent with normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in the model's core assessment of the candidate's skills. The change in work location from various global cities to Brazil did not impact the evaluation.
